name: BISP Kafaalat
eligibility: married women from low-income families with PMT poverty score below threshold, household income roughly PKR 25,000/month or below, not a government employee
documents: CNIC, registered phone number, B-Form for children
process: get registered via BISP dynamic survey at a Tehsil office or NADRA desk, then receive quarterly stipend (currently around Rs 13,500)

name: Ehsaas Emergency Cash
eligibility: families with very low or disrupted income, daily wage earners, verified via NSER survey
process: send CNIC number via SMS to 8171 to check eligibility, then collect from a payment site
deadline: activated during emergencies and relief periods

name: PM Youth Business & Agriculture Loan
eligibility: Pakistani citizens aged 21-45 (lower minimum for IT/some categories) wanting to start or expand a business or farm
documents: CNIC, business plan, educational/technical certificates if any
process: apply online via the PMYP portal and partner banks

name: Ehsaas Undergraduate Scholarship (HEC)
eligibility: students from low-income families enrolled in partner public universities, need plus merit based
documents: CNIC, income certificate, university enrollment proof
process: apply through the HEC Ehsaas scholarship portal during the open cycle

name: Sehat Sahulat Program (Health Card)
eligibility: families registered under BISP/Ehsaas or with household income around PKR 25,000/month or below in covered districts
process: check eligibility by CNIC on the provincial health portal, collect card, use at empaneled hospitals

name: Benazir Taleemi Wazaif
eligibility: children (boys and girls) of BISP Kafaalat families who are enrolled in and regularly attending school (primary to higher secondary)
documents: child B-Form, mother's CNIC, school enrollment proof
process: enroll child in school, ensure attendance, stipend paid quarterly through BISP

name: BISP Nashonuma
eligibility: pregnant and breastfeeding women and children under 2 in BISP families, to prevent child stunting
process: register at a BISP Nashonuma facilitation center, receive nutrition support and conditional cash

name: PM Youth Skill Development Program
eligibility: youth (roughly 18-35) seeking free technical and vocational training
process: apply online through the PMYP/NAVTTC skills portal and attend a partner institute

name: Kisan Card (Punjab)
eligibility: registered farmers in Punjab, typically small landholders
process: register on the Kisan Card portal, receive subsidies for fertilizer, seeds and equipment via the card

name: Benazir Mazdoor Card / Ehsaas Labour Program
eligibility: daily wage earners, contract workers and registered laborers from low-income households
documents: CNIC, proof of labor/worker registration if available
process: register through the labour program portal or BISP, receive cash assistance and social protection

name: CM Punjab Ration / Subsidy Package
eligibility: low-income families in Punjab, often BISP-registered, household income around PKR 25,000/month or below
process: check eligibility by CNIC via the relevant 8070/portal, receive subsidized ration or cash during the package period

name: Ehsaas Interest-Free Loan (Akhuwat)
eligibility: poor adults wanting a small business loan, low household income, no formal collateral required
process: apply via the Ehsaas/Akhuwat interest-free loan program in your area

name: CM Punjab Free Laptop Scheme
eligibility: high-achieving students enrolled in public universities/colleges in Punjab
documents: CNIC, university enrollment and merit/result proof
process: register on the laptop scheme portal during the open cycle

name: Naya Pakistan / Government Housing Scheme
eligibility: low and middle-income citizens who do not already own a home
process: apply through the housing scheme portal and partner banks for subsidized installment housing

name: Disability Support (BISP / Ehsaas Special Persons)
eligibility: persons with a verified disability from low-income households
documents: CNIC, disability certificate from the relevant authority
process: register through BISP/provincial social welfare for cash support and assistive services
